Bafna Toys — Wholesale Toy Manufacturer, Coimbatore

Toys Manufacturers in India — Bafna Toys

Bafna Toys is one of India's leading wholesale toy manufacturers based in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu. We supply premium quality toys at factory-direct prices — pullback cars, PVC dolls, windup key toys, board games, baby rattles, squeezy toys and educational toys. Trusted by retailers and distributors across India.

Our Product Categories

  • 🚗 Pullback Cars & Vehicles
  • 🪆 PVC Dolls & Figures
  • 🔑 Windup Key Toys
  • 🎲 Board Games & Puzzles
  • 🍼 Baby Rattles & Teethers
  • 🦆 Squeezy & Bath Toys
  • ✏️ Educational Toys
  • 🏍️ Motorcycle & Bike Toys

Why Buy from Bafna Toys?

  • Factory-direct wholesale prices — no middlemen
  • 300+ unique toy products in catalogue
  • GST registered manufacturer (Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu)
  • Pan-India delivery — COD & online payment accepted
  • Trusted by 1000+ retailers across India
  • BIS-compliant, child-safe materials
